raw_input:
[3.0/5] The cream is blue but goes on clear; it is very hydrating; looks like ½ a jar The photo on Amazon must be wrong. This cream is blue and not white. I hate colored creams. However, this goes on clear and was so super hydrating to my face, that I did not mark it down for the color. Note that the box it came in was all smashed and it was almost double the size of the jar. They could have fit almost two jars of this in the box. In addition, the cream in the jar looks half full.

I love the results but not the packaging or the color or the jar being half full.

The current price of $15.99 for 1.69 fluid ounces is competitive. NOTE THE SIZING (.05 fluid ounces) SPECIFIED ON AMAZON is wrong too. [4.0/5] A Good Aloe/Hyaluronic Gel Cream-(but the jar isn't full?) This is a nice, light gel cream packed with aloe and hyaluronic acid, 2 things I love to use on my dry, sensitive aging skin. Easy to apply-a little goes a long way. Absorption is fast and does not leave a greasy/stick feel behind. Instantly hydrates and soothes the red patches of inflammation that plagues my skin.

The cream itself if a light blue-ish/grey-ish color but don't worry, it doesn't discolor skin. There is a bit of a scent that I find to be medicinal though it fades quickly.

I do not know if it occurred during shipping (the product shifted) or if its normal but my jar seemed to be missing some cream (see photo). Despite this, its still a good, affordable cream that works well on even the driest of skin. [3.0/5] Leaves slight oily sheen It is cooling on the skin when I apply it. Smells like winter mint gum. Takes a lot of rubbing for it to fully absorb and leaves a slightly oily sheen on my skin. [5.0/5] Very hydrating Great moisturizer. It goes on light and doesn’t make my skin feel sticky, It absorbs quickly leaving my skin hydrated, it's also good for the summer [5.0/5] Light This is a great moisturizer. It goes on light and doesn’t make my skin feel sticky. It absorbs quickly and my skin is dewy and moist. [5.0/5] Face feels great Had dry skin around face causing ash fall. Started using this and now my face feels smooth and no flakes. Worked great.

No strong odors and no white residue forming over time so definitely well worth using the product. [4.0/5] Awesome for sensitive skin I am blown away by this product. I have super dry, sensitive skin and this product has been so soothing for my skin. I get eczema on my face occasionally, and this product didn't even bother that! It is so hydrating and I love the light, pleasant smell of it. It is cooling when you apply and feels like a luxury product, I honestly can't believe how affordable it is. A little goes a long way, so even though it comes in a pretty small jar, I think it will last me awhile. I do wish that it was available in a pump or tube for sanitary purposes but it is easy enough to just use a little spoon to scoop out the product. My one complaint on this product is that it has shown a bit of piling under makeup for me but not as bad as some other ones I have tried. This is lessened by making sure to thoroughly rub in the product and let it absorb before makeup application. Overall, I really love this product and will definitely be repurchasing when I finish it! [5.0/5] Love this great cream Pros:

Absorbed quickly

Nongreasy

Mild and pleasant scent

Cons:

None so far! [3.0/5] For normal and combo skin I like the Aloe vera as the main formula ingredient of this product. This helps moisturize, hydrates and feeling cool on my skin. The downside of the gel cream is not fast absorbent, builds up like dirt or dead skin while slightly rubbing on the face, the scent is too strong for me. [4.0/5] Good light weight moisturizer It doesn't really have a smell which is nice, so your not constantly smelling it. Its a nice color a very light light blue, I used it a few times I didn't have any kid reaction to it. It feels sticky at first but goes away after a minute or two. I like this product overall but I wasn't a fan after a while of rubbing my hand on my face it started to feel like it was rubbing off like when your skin is peeling. But overall decent moisturizer good for the price point! [3.0/5] Not as pictured Everything about the product I received is the same as the listing EXCEPT for the color... I get getting maybe an off-white colored cream but what I got was like a blue grey instead of the white in the listing. This would have made me question the integrity of the product because it didn't come with a safety seal or inner cap like most beauty products have nowadays. But I think that is the norm for this brand product because I tried one other product by this brand in the same type of packaging and that also did not have any type of safety seal. So for that I guess there is no issue to the product integrity. The consistency of the gel cream is pretty much the way that they describe it, it's thickness is like that of a cream but does feel cooling like a gel. I had applied it while my face was still slightly damp after a shower so it didn't absorb too quickly due to the moisture already on my skin. It did feel soothing once I smooth it all over my skin. It had a fresh clean scent to it and it did not irritate my skin. But once it dried and fully absorbed into my skin, I still felt like my skin was a little bit tight and still needed extra moisture. So I did end up adding another layer of facial moisturizer of a different brand that I normally use. Although my skin did feel soft and smooth after this product had dried, it just did not feel like it was fully moisturized. So I'm not really crazy about this product as I would probably not recommend it for someone who has very dry skin. [5.0/5] Love the way my skin looks and feels I was really excited by the moisturizing qualities I heard about this product. It lived up to the hype. However, I feel like this product also smooths out my skin. Maybe my skin responds well to the green tint but my skin tone looks more balanced when I use this.

My only complaint is that it takes a lot of patience to work into the skin. Apparently, aloe vera tends to sit on the skin. Because of this it tends to mix with liquid foundation when I try to apply it. However, I just choose to use this as my nighttime moisturizer and on days I don't use foundation (most days).

I just ran out and have returned to products I used beforehand, and I honestly miss how this product made my skim look and feel.

I will be buying again and again. A new staple in my skincare routine. [5.0/5] Love the way my skin looks and feels I was really excited by the moisturizing qualities I heard about this product. It lived up to the hype. However, I feel like this product also smooths out my skin. Maybe my skin responds well to the green tint but my skin tone looks more balanced when I use this.

My only complaint is that it takes a lot of patience to work into the skin. Apparently, aloe vera tends to sit on the skin. Because of this it tends to mix with liquid foundation when I try to apply it. However, I just choose to use this as my nighttime moisturizer and on days I don't use foundation (most days).

I just ran out and have returned to products I used beforehand, and I honestly miss how this product made my skim look and feel.

I will be buying again and again. A new staple in my skincare routine. [4.0/5] Nice smelling aloe moisturizer Makes rough spots go away and smells good too. This is an even better deal when you get an additional 30percent off
Aloe is very effective for bruises or rough skin. We really liked the product [5.0/5] excellent moisturizer I like this moisturizer very much. I've found that for my skin, a product made with aloe vera works well and is more effective than other creams. This gel/cream is quite thick with a light blue/green color. A small dab is all you need to massage into the skin. I've been using it on my face and the backs of my hands to keep plumped and fresh looking. This is a product that's made in France. [5.0/5] Nice Moisturizer This moisturizer is described as a gel cream and contains aloe vera and hyaluronic acid. The latter is something I always want in face creams because it does a great job on my aging skin. The aloe vera is a nice touch, as well.

I'm usually the one complaining about fragrances, but this time, I'm happy. The gel-cream has a light (quickly dissipating) scent that's herby, almost minty. Unlike many fragrances, it doesn't bother my sinuses, plus I enjoy the odor.

This product goes on clear and soaks in fast. I mainly use it on a dry spot on my face that flakes if I skip hyaluronic for more than a day or two. There's no sign of the flaky spot, so I'm very happy with this reasonably-priced cream. [5.0/5] Love it. What can I say except I love it. Not like a typical gel cream, this actually feels more like a cream, but very light. You don’t need much and it moisturizes well. The scent is also very faint, which I like. [5.0/5] Feel good and light This moisturizer is lightweight and absorbs well into the skin. Leaves my skin looking and feeling well hydrated without being heavy. I like the aloe as it’s so good for my skin.

response:
Cream blue-grey color, go clear on skin. Amazon photo wrong, show white. Some people hate colored cream. Hydrating, absorb fast, feel light, not greasy, not sticky. Skin feel smooth, dewy, soft after use.

Smell like mint or herby. Some find scent strong, some find pleasant, fade quick.

Good for dry, sensitive, aging skin. Help with eczema, red patches, inflammation, flaking, ash. Aloe vera and hyaluronic acid main good ingredients. Little bit go long way.

Some complaints: take long rub in, leave slight oily sheen, pill under makeup, build up dead skin with rubbing, feel tight after dry. Not come with pump or tube, only jar with small spoon. Some jar look half full.

Price around $15.99 for 1.69 oz. Amazon list wrong size. Product made in France.

Most reviewers happy, many repurchase. Good for dry sensitive skin. Not ideal for combo or normal skin. Use at night if wear liquid foundation, aloe sit on top skin and mix bad with foundation.
